title: eucryphia × penwithensis
intro: Eucryphia × penwithensis is a hybrid plant, specifically a cross between Eucryphia lucida and Eucryphia cordifolia, native to the UK, and is also known as the Penwith Eucryphia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Eucryphia × penwithensis include its potential to soothe respiratory issues, reduce stress, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
